harvey-brooks.name: Harvey Brooks
harvey-brooks.title: Senior Financial Editor
harvey-brooks.bio: Harvey Brooks is a consumer finance writer and editor specializing in credit repair, personal lending, and debt management. With over a decade of experience covering the lending industry, he is committed to making financial literacy accessible to everyday Americans.

editorial-team.name: CreditDoc Editorial Team
editorial-team.title: Consumer Finance Specialists
editorial-team.bio: Written and reviewed by finance professionals with combined experience in consumer lending, credit repair, and financial wellness education.
